title: Lot 1 award review
summary: This is a simulated review: DemoMed Ltd. is identified as the Lot 1 winner. Although Andes Clinical Supply submitted the lower-priced offer, DemoMed received the higher evaluation score.

sections.heading: Award outcome
sections.body: The award resolution names DemoMed Ltd. as the winner of Lot 1.

sections.heading: Evaluation scores
sections.body: The evaluation report records 92.4 points for DemoMed and 86.1 points for Andes Clinical Supply.

sections.heading: Opening prices
sections.body: The opening record lists DemoMed at CLP 48,500,000 and Andes Clinical Supply at CLP 46,900,000.

sections.heading: Why Andes was not awarded
sections.body: Andes Clinical Supply was not awarded because its total evaluated score was lower. The reviewed evaluation identifies delivery time and warranty within the technical difference.

gaps: This is a synthetic fixture for illustration, not an official tender record or award decision.
The available evidence identifies the reviewed score and technical differences, but does not provide a full criterion-by-criterion scoring breakdown.
recommendation: Use the award resolution and final evaluation report together when reviewing the Lot 1 outcome; do not treat the lower opening price alone as determinative.
